name: Lieutenant Kess
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, scout lieutenant muddy cloak, eyes reflecting campfire, tense, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: They rebuild confidence with wood and iron. Break the machines and you break their courage.

nodes.text:
Three targets. You can’t guarantee all three.

1) Siege tower wheels.
2) Gate ram head.
3) Pitch cauldrons.

If you kept the banner secret, they won’t be looking for you.
If you revealed it publicly, expect tighter patrols.

name: Elin of the Far Farms
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, exhausted carpenter prisoner behind bars, splinters in hands, determined eyes, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: If you’re here to kill us, do it quick. If you’re here to help… listen.

nodes.text:
The wheelhouse hub has a soft join—hammer a wedge there and the tower limps.

The ram head chain is kept by the foreman.

And the pitch pits… sand ruins it better than water.

choices.label: Promise to free the cages if possible.
